metadata.name: octora_executor
metadata.description: On-chain executor that wraps Meteora DLMM via CPI on behalf of stealth wallets

instructions.name: add_liquidity
docs: Add liquidity to a previously-initialised DLMM position. The stealth
wallet authorises; the PDA signs the inner Meteora CPI as position
owner.
`liquidity_params` is the Borsh-encoded `LiquidityParameterByStrategy`
blob expected by DLMM. We forward bytes verbatim to stay decoupled
from Meteora's strategy enum.

accounts.name: stealth
docs: Stealth wallet authorising the deposit. Outer signer only.

accounts.name: position_authority
docs: PDA that owns the Meteora position. Must already exist (created via
`init_position`).
`seeds` re-derives the address from the stealth signer, so the only
way to land on this PDA is to sign with the wallet it was created
for. The explicit `constraint` is belt-and-braces: even if a future
change adds an index byte to the seeds, the on-account
`stealth_pubkey` field still has to match.

accounts.name: dlmm_program
docs: The DLMM program — verified by program ID.

instructions.name: claim_fees
docs: Claim accrued swap fees on the position into ATAs whose owner is
pinned to `PositionAuthority.exit_recipient`.

accounts.name: stealth
docs: Stealth wallet authorising the claim. Outer signer only.

accounts.name: position_authority
docs: PDA that owns the Meteora position. Position + lb_pair + exit_recipient
are read from here and enforced against the forwarded accounts.

instructions.name: init_position
docs: Initialise a Meteora DLMM position owned by a `PositionAuthority` PDA
derived from the stealth wallet. Forwards account list to DLMM's
`initialize_position` ix.

accounts.name: stealth
docs: The stealth wallet that authorises this position. It is the outer
signer; it does NOT sign the inner DLMM CPI — the PDA does.

accounts.name: position_authority
docs: PDA created here. Owns the Meteora position from DLMM's perspective.

accounts.name: dlmm_program
docs: The Meteora DLMM program. Verified against `DLMM_PROGRAM_ID`.

instructions.name: withdraw_close
docs: Remove `bps_to_remove` basis points of liquidity from the inclusive
bin range `[from_bin_id, to_bin_id]` and close the position. Tokens
flow to ATAs constrained to `exit_recipient`; the position rent
rebate goes to the same address.

errors.name: DlmmProgramMismatch
errors.msg: DLMM program account does not match the configured program ID

errors.name: PositionMismatch
errors.msg: Position account passed in does not match PositionAuthority.position

errors.name: LbPairMismatch
errors.msg: LB pair account passed in does not match PositionAuthority.lb_pair

errors.name: StealthMismatch
errors.msg: Stealth signer does not match PositionAuthority.stealth_pubkey

errors.name: ExitRecipientMismatch
errors.msg: Token account owner does not match PositionAuthority.exit_recipient

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Failed to deserialize SPL token account

types.name: PositionAuthority
docs: PDA that owns a Meteora DLMM position on behalf of a stealth wallet.
The PDA is the position's `owner` field as far as Meteora is concerned;
only this program can sign for it, and only when the outer instruction
is signed by the matching `stealth_pubkey`.

fields.name: stealth_pubkey
docs: Stealth wallet that authorises actions against this position.

fields.name: lb_pair
docs: Meteora `LbPair` this position is opened against.

fields.name: position
docs: Meteora `Position` account owned by this PDA.

fields.name: exit_recipient
docs: Where claim/withdraw outflows are allowed to land. Set at init and
immutable afterwards: every `claim_fees` and `withdraw_close` checks
that the destination ATAs (and rent receiver) resolve to this owner,
so a leaked stealth key still can't redirect funds elsewhere.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `[POSITION_AUTHORITY_SEED, stealth_pubkey]`.
